example: The car's windshield was covered with snow.
A branch from the tree was blocking the road.
There was a traffic jam because the tree blocked the road.
The timber truck used its claw to move the branch.
Malift brought a chainsaw to cut the branch.
The digger moved the soil to dig out the tree.
The timber truck grabbed the tree trunk with its claw.
The water truck brought water to help the tree grow.
The bulldozer cleared the snow from the road.
The bulldozer has a large orange blade to remove snow.
The snow blower cleans snow from the roads and slides.
The snow falls through the red discharge of the snow blower.
The road is slippery because of the snow.
The excavator poured sand into the truck's body.
The small truck has a special mechanism for spreading sand.
The snowplow is going to work to clear the roads.
The tow truck pulled the car from the snow drift.
The car got stuck in a snow drift.
Studded wheels are safer to use in winter.
